title: Noah Lucas homepage v029 glass thickness and pane edge staging fix
changeSummary: Makes the Clear, Ultrathin, Thin, Regular, and Thick selector states control the actual pane fill, blur, and saturation values.
Separates the pane surface treatment from the inner section treatment so thickness changes remain visible.
Removes the exposed rounded outer pane and hero corners so the glass surface meets the image cleanly.
Preserves the proof-first work hierarchy from v028 and the untinted Yosemite image layer.
Leaves the production pointer and live Squarespace site unchanged.

validation.method: Local HTTP server plus in-app browser at 1280x720 and 390x844.
checks: All five glass states were selected and observed with distinct computed blur values.
Desktop and mobile screenshots show rectangular pane edges without exposed rounded corners.
Night Thick mode retains a dark pane fill and 30px blur.
No browser console warnings or errors were observed.
